creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
In the projects/clang400-import branch, we have imported the 4.0.0 trunk versions of llvm, clang, lldb and libc++.  Since these will be branched by upstream for release very soon, I would like to request an exp-run using this branch, to find regressions.

For executing the run, please use:

svn://svn.freebsd.org/base/projects/clang400-import

As of r311940, the branch has been synchronized to head r311939.
